problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
